Advance_player_distance.context: JSR	Advance_player_distance(PC) ; Commenting out disables visual forward movement (also map) but physically still moves as collisions eventually occur

Alloc_aux_object_slot_Return.context: BEQ.b	Alloc_aux_object_slot_Return                            ; 0 → nothing to spawn; return
BCC.b	Alloc_aux_object_slot_Return ; continue if distance to sign? < 120 (sign appears for next lap?)
BEQ.b	Alloc_aux_object_slot_Return ; jump to RTS if sign table byte = 0 (special sign?)

Apply_acceleration_done.context: BNE.b	Apply_acceleration_done ; Jump if max rpm for shift?

Apply_speed_delta.context: BCS.b	Apply_speed_delta ; if not D0 < 2 (max acceleration)

Bad_rom_handler.context: BNE.w	Bad_rom_handler             ; mismatch → bad ROM handler (blue screen, infinite loop)

Boot_init_data.context: LEA	Boot_init_data(PC), A5         ; A5 = register init data table (VDP init bytes follow)

Divide_fractional.context: JSR	Divide_fractional ; D7 = D5 / D6 = displacement / length = displacement per step

EntryPoint_Cold_boot.context: BNE.w	EntryPoint_Cold_boot             ; not set yet → loop back to cold-boot pre-init

EntryPoint_Tmss_done.context: BEQ.b	EntryPoint_Tmss_done             ; TMSS not present → skip unlock

EntryPoint_Warm_boot.context: BNE.w	EntryPoint_Warm_boot             ; warm reboot: skip to full RAM init (Boot_init_sentinel check)

ErrorTrap1.context: LEA	ErrorTrap1.w, A0    ; A0 = $0200 (start of checksum region, skip vector table+header)

Handle_race_marker_Update.context: BEQ.b	Handle_race_marker_Update ; then skip brake zone processing

Initialize_default_lap_times.context: JSR	Initialize_default_lap_times ; copy ROM default BCD lap records to RAM

Initialize_ui_tilemap_buffers.context: JSR	Initialize_ui_tilemap_buffers ; decompress and arrange all UI tilemap buffers

Integrate_curveslope.context: JSR	Integrate_curveslope(PC) ; parse curve data (why done here also?)

Integrate_curveslope_Accum.context: BEQ.b	Integrate_curveslope_Accum ; jump if same curve/slope data as last step (continues with precious A4 value)
BMI.b	Integrate_curveslope_Accum ; jump if previous turn was right turn/up slope

Integrate_curveslope_Curved.context: BNE.b	Integrate_curveslope_Curved ; jump if not 0 (not straight/flat road)

Integrate_curveslope_Right.context: BNE.b	Integrate_curveslope_Right ; jump if right turn/up slope

Integrate_curveslope_Sentinel.context: BMI.b	Integrate_curveslope_Sentinel ; jump if end of displacement data
BMI.b	Integrate_curveslope_Sentinel ; jump if end of displacement data

Load_startup_graphics.context: JSR	Load_startup_graphics(PC) ; decompress initial attract/title tile data

Load_track_data_Curve_entry.context: BEQ.b	Load_track_data_Curve_entry ; jump if right turn

Load_track_data_Curve_right.context: BEQ.b	Load_track_data_Curve_right ; jump if right turn

Load_track_data_Slope_entry.context: BEQ.b	Load_track_data_Slope_entry ; jump if down slope

Parse_sign_data.context: JSR	Parse_sign_data(PC) ; Commenting out makes signs and obstacles disappear (physical and visual)

Parse_sign_data_Advance_location.context: BCS.b	Parse_sign_data_Advance_location ; jump if distance to sign < 120

Parse_sign_data_Consume_record.context: BCS.b	Parse_sign_data_Consume_record                           ; jump if within 120 units

Parse_sign_data_Next.context: BCC.b	Parse_sign_data_Next                          ; > 120 units to end → no finish-line sign yet

Parse_sign_data_Row_loop.context: BCC.b	Parse_sign_data_Row_loop                           ; still out of range → return

Parse_sign_data_Special.context: BCC.b	Parse_sign_data_Special ; jump if sign table byte >= $0015 (special sign, tunnel?)

Parse_tileset_for_signs.context: JSR	Parse_tileset_for_signs(PC) ; Commenting out makes signs have the wrong textures

Parse_tileset_for_signs_Near.context: BCS.b	Parse_tileset_for_signs_Near                   ; jump if within 120 units

Parse_tileset_for_signs_Return.context: BCC.b	Parse_tileset_for_signs_Return                   ; still > 120 → not yet; return

Parse_tileset_for_signs_Write_buf.context: BRA.b	Parse_tileset_for_signs_Write_buf                           ; write Flagkeeper_tileset tileset to Sign_tileset_buf

Send_sign_tileset_to_VDP_Last_frame.context: BCS.b	Send_sign_tileset_to_VDP_Last_frame ; jump if D0 was < $01E1

Update_engine_and_tire_sounds.context: JSR	Update_engine_and_tire_sounds(PC) ; Commenting out removes sound

Update_horizontal_position.context: JSR	Update_horizontal_position(PC) ; Commenting out disables left/right movement (but visually wheels still turn)

Update_horizontal_position_Apply_steerin.context: BEQ.b	Update_horizontal_position_Apply_steering ; jump if straight. Upcoming instructions calculate horizontal position displacement from turning
BEQ.b	Update_horizontal_position_Apply_steering ; jump if left turn

Update_input_bitset.context: JSR	Update_input_bitset(PC) ; Update_input_bitset called from multiple locations, from here during practice mode

Update_objects_and_build_sprite_buffer.context: JSR	Update_objects_and_build_sprite_buffer(PC) ; Commenting out makes graphics freeze

Update_objects_loop.context: BNE.b	Update_objects_loop ; loop from A0=$FFFFAD80 in jumps of $40 at most #$004C steps (final iteration at $FFFFC040)

Update_road_graphics.context: JSR	Update_road_graphics(PC) ; Commenting out makes road graphics not updates (but signs still move)

Update_road_graphics_Read_sentinel.context: BCS.b	Update_road_graphics_Read_sentinel ; road displacement was negative, stop rendering

Update_rpm_At_max.context: BCC.b	Update_rpm_At_max ; Jump if rpm >= max

Update_shift_Auto_dispatch.context: LEA	Update_shift_Auto_dispatch, A1                 ; else perform automatic shift down check ...

Update_shift_Down.context: BNE.w	Update_shift_Down                 ; then shift down (even in automatic!)

Update_speed_Decel_clamp.context: BMI.b	Update_speed_Decel_clamp ; if negative, go to max deacceleration check

Update_steering.context: JSR	Update_steering(PC) ; Commenting out disables left/right movement

Update_steering_Auto_centre.context: BEQ.b	Update_steering_Auto_centre ; Jump if no key pressed

Update_visual_rpm.context: BNE.w	Update_visual_rpm        ; then only update visual rpm, Update_breaking will do RPM update instead
BCS.b	Update_visual_rpm ; Jump if rpm < max

Update_visual_rpm_Falling.context: BMI.b	Update_visual_rpm_Falling ; Jump if (rpm+1) - visual_rpm < 0, meaning rpm+1 < visual_rpm (rpm is at least 2 less than visual)
